name: logistics carriers managing 5-15 vehicles tool
description: For logistics carriers managing 5-15 vehicles, inefficient tracking of vehicle maintenance causes unexpected breakdowns. We automate maintenance tracking instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking of vehicle maintenance leading to unexpected breakdowns.
features: manual entry of vehicle maintenance records
